auth.label: API Access Key
auth.description: The vatlayer API access key sent with the access_key query parameter.

actions.name: calculate_price
actions.description: Calculate VAT-compliant inclusive and exclusive prices with vatlayer.

type.description: Reduced VAT type to apply, such as medical or books.

incl.description: Whether the amount already includes VAT and should be reverse-calculated.

countryCode.description: Two-letter ISO country code to select country VAT rates.

ipAddress.description: Custom IP address to use to geolocate a country for VAT rate lookup.

useClientIp.description: Whether vatlayer should use the requester's IP address to determine the country.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for calculating VAT-compliant prices with vatlayer.

success.description: Whether the VAT price calculation succeeded.

country_code.description: Country code used for the calculation.

country_name.description: Country name used for the calculation.

vat_rate.description: VAT rate in percent applied during the calculation.

anyOf.description: Reduced VAT type used for the calculation.

outputSchema.description: VAT-compliant price calculation result returned by vatlayer.

actions.name: get_rate
actions.description: Retrieve VAT rates for one country selected by country code, IP address, or client IP.

countryCode.description: Two-letter ISO country code to select country VAT rates.

ipAddress.description: Custom IP address to use to geolocate a country for VAT rate lookup.

useClientIp.description: Whether vatlayer should use the requester's IP address to determine the country.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving VAT rates for one country with vatlayer.

success.description: Whether the VAT rate lookup succeeded.

country_code.description: Two-letter country code for which rates are returned.

additionalProperties.description: VAT rate percentage for the reduced rate type.

reduced_rates.description: Mapping of reduced VAT rate type names to VAT percentages.

outputSchema.description: Single-country VAT rate response returned by vatlayer.

actions.name: list_rates
actions.description: Retrieve VAT rates for all EU member states from vatlayer.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving VAT rates for all EU member states with vatlayer.

success.description: Whether the VAT rate list lookup succeeded.

additionalProperties.description: VAT rate percentage for the reduced rate type.

reduced_rates.description: Mapping of reduced VAT rate type names to VAT percentages.

additionalProperties.description: VAT rate details for one country.

rates.description: Mapping of two-letter country codes to VAT rate details.

outputSchema.description: VAT rates for all EU member states returned by vatlayer.

actions.name: list_types
actions.description: List vatlayer reduced VAT rate type identifiers for price calculations.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing vatlayer reduced VAT rate types.

success.description: Whether the reduced VAT type list lookup succeeded.

types.description: Available reduced VAT rate type identifiers.

outputSchema.description: Reduced VAT rate types returned by vatlayer.

actions.name: validate_vat_number
actions.description: Validate a VAT number and return company information when vatlayer finds it.

vatNumber.description: VAT number to validate, including the country prefix when available.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for validating a VAT number with vatlayer.

valid.description: Whether the VAT number is valid and active according to official member state records.

database.description: Whether the member state's VAT database was reachable.

format_valid.description: Whether the supplied VAT number has a syntactically valid format.

query.description: The original VAT number string passed to vatlayer.

country_code.description: Two-letter country code parsed from the VAT number.

vat_number.description: VAT number without the two-letter country prefix.

anyOf.description: Company name associated with the VAT number.
Company address associated with the VAT number.

outputSchema.description: VAT number validation response returned by vatlayer.
